title: GenericCodeLibrary
description: Contains the common code used in most of KSmc_brigade's client-side mods.
body: GenericCodeLibrary is a Lib mod that includes some utility classes and an event system based on Google Event Bus. It features events such as TimerEvent, GetOptionValueEvent, BlockLightingEvent, etc., and contains the common code used in most of KSmc_brigade's client-side mods.
